uid.description: The unique identifier for the user from Firebase Auth.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

Username.title: Username Mapping
Username.description: Ensures username uniqueness by mapping usernames to UIDs.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this username.

/usernames/{username}.description: Collection of username mapping documents for uniqueness.

/test/connection.description: A document used to test the Firestore connection on boot.
